description: Primary fixed-time solver3 objective autoresearch metric. Every canonical case contributes through the same explicit normalized-score math and equal weight.
weighting_note: All solver3 objective autoresearch cases currently use equal weight 1.0, so the primary metric is the arithmetic mean of the six per-case normalized scores.
